question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `MultipartResolver` to upload excessively large files, exhausting disk space or memory and causing a denial-of-service?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `RequestMappingHandlerMapping` to enumerate all registered endpoints via reflection or actuator, discovering undocumented or debug endpoints that expose sensitive functionality?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `TaskExecutor` (used by `@EnableAsync`) to inject tasks into the executor via a public API endpoint, causing the executor to run attacker-controlled logic in the application's thread pool?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `TaskScheduler` (used by `@EnableScheduling`) to register new scheduled tasks via a public API endpoint, causing the scheduler to execute attacker-controlled logic at specified intervals?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `JmxAutoConfiguration` to access JMX endpoints that expose `@EnableAsync` thread pool metrics and `@EnableScheduling` task details, enabling reconnaissance and potential manipulation of application internals?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `CachingAutoConfiguration` to perform cache poisoning attacks, injecting malicious data into application caches that are then served to other users?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `DataSourceAutoConfiguration` to trigger multiple `HikariDataSource` instantiations from `CommonConfiguration`, exhausting database connection limits and causing a denial-of-service?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `FlywayAutoConfiguration` to trigger database migration execution via an exposed endpoint, potentially running malicious migration scripts that alter the database schema?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `HibernateJpaAutoConfiguration` to trigger Hibernate schema validation or update operations via a crafted request, causing unintended database schema modifications?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `TransactionAutoConfiguration` to cause transaction boundary violations by crafting requests that span multiple transactions, leading to data inconsistency or partial updates?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `SecurityAutoConfiguration` (if present) to trigger a brute-force attack against default credentials, gaining elevated access to the `RestJavaApplication`?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/RestJavaApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Class: RestJavaApplication] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the `@SpringBootApplication` annotation's auto-configuration of Spring's `OAuth2AutoConfiguration` (if present) to perform an OAuth2 token theft or CSRF attack, escalating privileges within the `RestJavaApplication`?
